計算Black-Scholes選擇權隱含波動度

周育呈

2023-11-12

1. 前言

這是碩一下\(\color{red}{數值分析}\)有上過的內容，這篇的程式碼是從老師檔案改的，我把計算過程寫成一個function(Calculator)-ImpliedVolatility()，使用上更方便，ImpliedVolatility的程式碼我一樣放在雲端的另一個檔案。
其實網路上直接Google- \(Implied \ Volatility \ Calculator\)就有很多網站可以計算隱含波動度了，這篇side-profect的計算結果以網站計算結果來檢驗是否正確。
如果想在R語言裡計算選擇權相關的數值，我有找到一個套件\(\bf derivmkts\)可以用，使用方式也會在下面提到。

2. Arguments

我寫了一個函數-ImpliedVolatility，可以計算隱含波動度跟選擇權價格，這裡說明如何輸入arguments。

  • 2.1 Mode
    輸入字串’Price’ 或 ‘Vol’，選擇要計算選擇權價格還是隱含波動度。

  • 2.2 type
    輸入字串’Call’ 或 ‘Put’，選擇要計算買權還是賣權。

  • 2.3 ss
    輸入現貨價格。

  • 2.4 kk
    輸入履約價。

  • 2.5 tt
    輸入選擇權到期天數，單位為天。

  • 2.6 rr
    輸入無風險利率，如利率為1.1%，則輸入1.1，不是輸入0.011。

  • 2.7 qq
    輸入股息殖利率，如股息殖利率為0.58%，則輸入0.58，不是輸入0.0058。

  • 2.8 OptionPrice
    輸入選擇權價格，如果Mode = ‘Price’，則不需輸入。

  • 2.9 sig
    輸入現貨報酬率的波動度，如波動度為20%，則輸入20，不是輸入0.2，如果Mode = ‘Vol’，則不需輸入。

  • 2.10 xstart
    這是解數值解的起點，是nleqslv的argument，有default值=0.1，原則上不需輸入。

3. Output

輸入完arguments後，ImpliedVolatility會直接在Console顯示輸入的內容跟計算的值(選擇權價格或隱含波動度)。
舉4個例子，計算Call、Put的價格跟隱含波動度各1個。

3.1 Call-Vol

ImpliedVolatility(Mode = "Vol",sig = 20,type = "Call", ss = 88,
                  kk = 95,tt = 51,rr = 3.2,qq = 0,OptionPrice = 3.52)
##  Option Type : Call 
##  Underlying Price =  88 
##  Strike Price =  95 
##  Interest Rate =  3.2 % 
##  Days to Expiration =  51 
##  Dividend Yield =  0 % 
##  Option Price =  3.52 
##  ------------------------------ 
##  Implied Volatility =  46.112 %

3.2 Put-Vol

ImpliedVolatility(Mode = "Vol",sig = 20,type = "Put", ss = 147,
                  kk = 152,tt = 112,rr = 1.65,qq = 0.45,OptionPrice = 4.5)
##  Option Type : Put 
##  Underlying Price =  147 
##  Strike Price =  152 
##  Interest Rate =  1.65 % 
##  Days to Expiration =  112 
##  Dividend Yield =  0.45 % 
##  Option Price =  4.5 
##  ------------------------------ 
##  Implied Volatility =  3.362 %

3.3 Call-Price

ImpliedVolatility(Mode = "Price",sig = 20,type = "Call", ss = 50,
                         kk = 52,tt = 100,rr = 2.2,qq = 1.2,OptionPrice = 2.41)
##  Underlying Price =  50 
##  Strike Price =  52 
##  Interest Rate =  2.2 % 
##  Days to Expiration =  100 
##  Dividend Yield =  1.2 % 
##  Volatility =  20 % 
##  ------------------------- 
##  Call Price =  1.3204 
##  Put Price =  3.1721

3.4 Put-Price

ImpliedVolatility(Mode = "Price",sig = 25,type = "Put", ss = 170,
                  kk = 165,tt = 145,rr = 2.4,qq = 5.2,OptionPrice = 5.89)
##  Underlying Price =  170 
##  Strike Price =  165 
##  Interest Rate =  2.4 % 
##  Days to Expiration =  145 
##  Dividend Yield =  5.2 % 
##  Volatility =  25 % 
##  ------------------------- 
##  Call Price =  11.9781 
##  Put Price =  8.8882

4. 檢驗

Google : implied volatility calculator，我選了3個網址來檢驗隱含波動度的計算結果。以下為網址:
https://www.option-price.com/implied-volatility.php (只有這個網址可計算包含股息殖利率的隱含波動度)
https://vindeep.com/Derivatives/ImpVolCalc.aspx
https://www.ultimateoptionscalculator.com/calculators/iv

Google : black-scholes calculator，我選了3個網址來檢驗選擇權價格的計算結果。以下為網址:
https://goodcalculators.com/black-scholes-calculator/
https://www.omnicalculator.com/finance/black-scholes
https://billmei.github.io/SimpleBlackScholes/

4.1 Call-Vol

4.2 Put-Vol

4.3 Call-Price

4.4 Put-Price

5. \(\bf derivmkts\)套件

套件介紹：A set of pricing and expository functions that should be useful in teaching a course on financial derivatives.
網址：https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/derivmkts/versions/0.2.5
這套建能計算的東西很多，我以下計算ImpliedVolatility、OptionPrice、Greeks。
以\(3. \ Output\)的選擇權來計算，注意套件的的利率相關數字要輸入原本數值，天數為年，可以直接輸入分數。

5.1 ImpliedVolatility

  • Call：bscallimpvol()
bscallimpvol(s = 88,k = 95,r = 0.032,tt = 51/365,d = 0,price = 3.52)
## [1] 0.4611156
  • Put ：bsputimpvol()
bsputimpvol(s = 147,k = 152,r = 0.0165,tt = 112/365,d = 0.0045,price = 4.5)
## [1] 0.03362449

5.2 OptionPrice

  • Call：bscall()
bscall(s = 50,k = 52,v = 0.2,r = 0.022,tt = 100/365,d = 0.012)
## [1] 1.320434
  • Put：bsput()
bsput(s = 170,k = 165,v = 0.25,r = 0.024,tt = 145/365,d = 0.052)
## [1] 8.888185

5.3 Greeks

函數網址：
https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/derivmkts/versions/0.2.5/topics/greeks

  • Call：greeks(bscall(s, k, v, r, tt, d))
greeks(bscall(s = 50,k = 52,v = 0.2,r = 0.022,tt = 100/365,d = 0.012))
##                 bscall
## Premium     1.32043372
## Delta       0.38230196
## Gamma       0.07270843
## Vega        0.09960061
## Rho         0.04875251
## Theta      -0.01040418
## Psi        -0.05237013
## Elasticity 14.47637841
  • Put：greeks(bsput(s, k, v, r, tt, d))
greeks(bsput(s = 170,k = 165,v = 0.25,r = 0.024,tt = 145/365,d = 0.052))
##                  bsput
## Premium     8.88818521
## Delta      -0.41303822
## Gamma       0.01430621
## Vega        0.41062189
## Rho        -0.31425148
## Theta      -0.04020048
## Psi         0.27894225
## Elasticity -7.89998136

謝謝你看到這~
